recording: unavailable: current Codex in-app browser capabilities exposed screenshot/appshot capture but no trace/video/replay recorder in this session

scenarios.actions: Open local app at / and observe default price filter/results.
scenarios.expected: Label is $10 to Any; expensive vehicles can appear when otherwise available.
scenarios.observed: label=$10 to Any; min=10; max=250; expensive=true; prices=$160/hr, $58/hr, $72/hr, $56/hr, $220/hr, $70/hr, $80/hr, $85/hr

scenarios.actions: Click the Maximum price slider in the visible DOM and send ArrowLeft keypresses until max reaches 100.
scenarios.expected: Label is $10 to $100; vehicles above $100/hr are hidden.
scenarios.observed: label=$10 to $100; min=10; max=100; expensive=false; prices=$58/hr, $72/hr, $56/hr, $70/hr, $80/hr, $85/hr

scenarios.actions: Send five ArrowRight keypresses from the $100 state to set maximum to $125.
scenarios.expected: Label is $10 to $125; vehicles above $125/hr are hidden.
scenarios.observed: label=$10 to $125; min=10; max=125; expensive=false; prices=$58/hr, $72/hr, $56/hr, $70/hr, $80/hr, $85/hr

scenarios.actions: Send ArrowRight keypresses until the maximum reaches the top Any state.
scenarios.expected: Label is $10 to Any; expensive vehicles appear again when otherwise available.
scenarios.observed: label=$10 to Any; min=10; max=250; expensive=true; prices=$160/hr, $58/hr, $72/hr, $56/hr, $220/hr, $70/hr, $80/hr, $85/hr
